todo.title: Tag System — Database Schema & CRUD
todo.description: Add 'tags' TEXT column (comma-separated) to clipboard_items table via migration. Add get_tags(), add_tag(), remove_tag(), get_items_by_tag() functions in storage.py. Tags are stored as '#tag1,#tag2' format in the DB.

todo.title: Tag Input Widget on Item Cards
todo.description: Add a tag input field below the content preview on each ItemCard. User types a tag like '#code' and presses Enter to add it. Display tags as clickable colored chips. Click a chip to remove the tag. Tags sync to DB via storage.add_tag() / remove_tag().

todo.title: Filter by Tag in Search Bar
todo.description: Extend the search bar to support tag filtering. Typing '#code' in search filters cards to only those tagged with #code. Combine text search + tag filter: 'python #code' shows text items containing 'python' AND tagged #code. Update storage.search_items() to accept optional tag filter.

todo.title: Collections — Database Schema & CRUD
todo.description: Create 'collections' table: id, name, created_at. Add 'collection_id' INTEGER FK column to clipboard_items table via migration. Add create_collection(), delete_collection(), get_collections(), move_to_collection() in storage.py. Default collection is NULL (uncategorized).

todo.title: Collections Sidebar Panel
todo.description: Add a collapsible sidebar on the left of Dashboard showing collection names. Click a collection to filter cards. 'All' shows everything. Right-click a collection to rename or delete. '+' button to create new collection. Drag a card onto a collection name to move it.

todo.title: Multi-Select Cards (Ctrl+Click)
todo.description: Hold Ctrl and click a card to toggle its selection. Selected cards get a neon green border + checkbox overlay. Shift+Click to select a range. Escape clears selection. Add 'selected' property to ItemCard. Dashboard tracks _selected_ids set.

todo.title: Bulk Actions Toolbar
todo.description: When 2+ cards are selected, show a floating action bar at the bottom: 'Pin All', 'Unpin All', 'Delete All', 'Export', 'Add Tag'. Each button operates on all selected item IDs. Confirmation dialog before bulk delete.

todo.title: Export Selected Items to .txt / .json
todo.description: Add export_items(item_ids, format) to storage.py. 'txt' format: one item per line with timestamp and content. 'json' format: array of item objects. Show file save dialog (QFileDialog) when user clicks Export. Export all selected items or all visible if none selected.

todo.title: Tag Autocomplete & Tag Manager
todo.description: Show autocomplete dropdown when typing '#' in tag input — lists existing tags from DB. Add a 'Manage Tags' button in settings that opens a dialog to rename/delete/merge tags globally. Update all affected items when a tag is renamed.

todo.title: Unit Tests for v1.3.0 Features
todo.description: Add tests/test_storage_v130.py covering: tag CRUD, collection CRUD, search with tag filter, export to txt/json. Add tests for multi-select logic if extractable. Target: 20+ new tests.
